song.title: All Hail The Power Of Jesus' Name
song.author: Edward Perronet, John Rippon, & Oliver Holden
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) All hail the pow’r of Jesus’ name! Let angels prostrate fall, Let angels prostrate fall; Bring forth the royal diadem,
[C] C) And crown Him, crown Him, crown Him, crown Him, And crown Him Lord of all.
[V2] 2) Ye chosen seed of Israel’s race, Ye ransomed from the fall, Ye ransomed from the fall; Hail Him Who saves you by His grace,
[V3] 3) Sinners, whose love can ne'er forget The worm-wood and the gall, The worm-wood and the gall, Go, spread your trophies at His feet,
[V4] 4) Let every kindred, every tribe, On this terrestrial ball, On this terrestrial ball, To Him all majesty ascribe,
[V5] 5) O that with yonder sacred throng We at His feet may fall, We at His feet may fall! We’ll join the everlasting song,
